parameters.content:
## Z-SIEM · QRadar Offense → IRIS Case (v3)
Every minute: fetch existing IRIS cases → poll QRadar open offenses → skip any offense whose `QR-<id>` case already exists → create the case → enrich IP indicators.

- **Dedup is authoritative**: `Build QRadar Case` checks `case_soc_id` from `Get IRIS Cases`, so a case can never be created twice (no side-file to drift).
- **QRadar** `GET /api/siem/offenses` · `SEC` credential · `Range: items=0-199`  ·  **IRIS** `/manage/cases/list` + `/manage/cases/add` · `IRIS API Key` credential
- Hosts from `$env.QRADAR_API_URL` / `$env.IRIS_API_URL`; tokens live in n8n credentials, never in this file.

nodes.name: Every minute
nodes.notes: Poll QRadar for open offenses every minute.

nodes.name: Get IRIS Cases
nodes.notes: Fetch existing IRIS cases so Build QRadar Case can skip offenses that already have a case (authoritative dedup by case_soc_id). Fail-closed: if this errors the poll stops rather than risk duplicates.

nodes.name: QRadar Get Offenses
nodes.notes: GET open offenses. Auth via the 'QRadar SEC' header-auth credential (Name=SEC) -- create it once on the server; token is NOT stored in this file. Range sent as HTTP header. allowUnauthorizedCerts=true because QRadar uses a self-signed cert; remediate by installing the QRadar CA into n8n (NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS) and removing this flag.

nodes.name: Build QRadar Case
nodes.notes: Skip offenses whose QR-<id> case already exists in IRIS (from Get IRIS Cases), then build the case body + SLA fields for new offenses.

nodes.name: Create IRIS Case
nodes.notes: Create the IRIS case. Success -> Store SLA Start. Error -> Log IRIS Failures (offense not marked seen, so it retries).

nodes.name: Store SLA Start
nodes.notes: Append an sla_started event to siem-sla-metrics.jsonl (best-effort) so the SLA Poller can complete the SLA on GUI close. Dedup is handled upstream by IRIS.

nodes.name: Build Enrich Input
nodes.notes: Construct the enrichment sub-workflow input, only for real IP indicators.

nodes.name: Enrich Case
nodes.notes: Fire enrichment (AbuseIPDB/Shodan/OTX) per case, async. workflowId must match the 'Z-SIEM Enrichment' sub-workflow id on this server.

nodes.name: Log IRIS Failures
nodes.notes: Append IRIS create failures to qradar-errors.jsonl for triage. Failed offenses retry next poll.
